summary: Stores and emits an Color color control value.
description: Use Color for color controls. Component values are normalized floats in graph and runtime payloads.
runtimeBehavior: in updates and emits, set updates silently, and bang emits the stored RGBA color/rgba32f without changing it.

ports.description: Updates the stored color/rgba32f and emits it.
Updates the stored color/rgba32f without emitting.
Emits the current stored color/rgba32f without changing it.

params.description: Optional typed channel name updated whenever this object emits.
Optional typed channel name used to receive routed updates.

example.title: Drive shader tint
example.description: Connect color to an annotation-generated shader tint uniform.
